title: Phase: Host Bun migration
summary: Phase plan and migration spec for moving the host runtime from Node + pnpm + vitest + tsx + better-sqlite3 to Bun + bun:test + bun:sqlite, with task list, API delta, verification, and rollback.
notes: Phase planning doc with strong SPEC characteristics (API delta tables, pragma contracts, named-param conventions, mock-translation rules, verification gates) plus an embedded completion report. Not an ADR (no single Context/Decision/Consequences structure; references decisions made elsewhere). Not a PRD (no user stories or product acceptance criteria). Could plausibly be DOC given the report/narrative sections, but the implementation contracts (better-sqlite3 to bun:sqlite mapping, journal_mode invariants, strict-mode constructor rule, mock pre-import pattern) are technical specifications the system must honor — SPEC chosen accordingly. Confidence medium because the document mixes phase planning, spec, and post-mortem narrative.
